title: Add PATCH to edit lobby Discord message on game start

log.context: Add PATCH to edit lobby Discord message on game start

Done. Here's what was done:

**Change:** In `/mnt/data/commons-server/src/index.ts`, added a fire-and-forget call to `updateLobbyDiscordMessage()` inside the `d_start` handler, immediately after `startRun()` returns a truthy result (i.e., the lobby has successfully transitioned to running state).

The call uses `.catch()` so any failure is logged but never throws. The edited message reads:
```
~~⚔️ **Adventurer** created a Clungiverse lobby! Join here: https://clung.us/clungiverse?lobby=<id>~~ *...(truncated)
